title: Respond to wildlife emergencies
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Respond to wildlife emergencies demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Evaluate wildlife emergency and implement interim care

pcs.text: Investigate nature of emergency from witness reports or inspections
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Investigate nature of emergency from witness reports or inspections?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate nature of emergency from witness reports or inspections.

pcs.text: Assess factors that impact on an appropriate response
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess factors that impact on an appropriate response?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess factors that impact on an appropriate response.

pcs.text: Notify authorities of incident according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Notify authorities of incident according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Notify authorities of incident according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Implement interim care of animals pending instructions from authorities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement interim care of animals pending instructions from authorities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement interim care of animals pending instructions from authorities.

pcs.text: Delegate appropriate staff to provide interim care for animals
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Delegate appropriate staff to provide interim care for animals?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Delegate appropriate staff to provide interim care for animals.

pcs.text: Ensure personnel assisting in interim care are equipped and briefed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure personnel assisting in interim care are equipped and briefed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure personnel assisting in interim care are equipped and briefed.

pcs.text: Implement care instructions provided by authorities or veterinarians
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement care instructions provided by authorities or veterinarians?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement care instructions provided by authorities or veterinarians.

pcs.text: Collect information to determine further action
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect information to determine further action?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect information to determine further action.

pcs.text: Interview informants to obtain details of the situation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Interview informants to obtain details of the situation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Interview informants to obtain details of the situation.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Evaluate wildlife emergency and implement interim care

elements.title: Implement response to emergency

pcs.text: Establish communications necessary to manage emergency situation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish communications necessary to manage emergency situation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish communications necessary to manage emergency situation.

pcs.text: Transport resources and personnel to site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Transport resources and personnel to site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Transport resources and personnel to site.

pcs.text: Establish site procedures and implement emergency plans according to legislative requirements and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish site procedures and implement emergency plans according to legislative requirements and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish site procedures and implement emergency plans according to legislative requirements and workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Move live fauna to safe location
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Move live fauna to safe location?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Move live fauna to safe location.

pcs.text: Remove dead fauna from site and dispose of biological matter according to workplace health and safety and biosecurity procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Remove dead fauna from site and dispose of biological matter according to workplace health and safety and biosecurity procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Remove dead fauna from site and dispose of biological matter according to workplace health and safety and biosecurity procedures.

pcs.text: Clean site according to workplace procedures to maintain public and environmental health and safety
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean site according to workplace procedures to maintain public and environmental health and safety?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean site according to workplace procedures to maintain public and environmental health and safety.

pcs.text: Implement measures that minimise risk to significant places, area, habitats, species and communities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement measures that minimise risk to significant places, area, habitats, species and communities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement measures that minimise risk to significant places, area, habitats, species and communities.
